title: Maison Valcere jewelry house: vector & print-readiness audit of the supplied luxury wordmark pack against the brand guideline and press spec (marked-up findings report)
one_line_ask: Audit the supplied Maison Valcere luxury wordmark pack (master SVG + raster export) against the brand guideline and the press/foil spec, and return a marked-up, region-referenced vector & print-readiness findings report listing every hairline-stroke, line-weight, palette, kerning and non-print-ready-path defect and the exact rule it breaks.

issues: Letter-spacing is visibly looser than a tight master (per brief, acceptable for a raster source).
No major defects; composition is clean, flat, and front-on. No icons or mockup elements. No visible watermark. Correct transparent background indicated by checkerboard.

Checkerboard pattern visible in background suggests transparency was not fully rendered as true alpha — background should be transparent (this may be a preview rendering artifact rather than a file defect)
Letter-spacing on 'VALCERE' appears moderately wide, consistent with brief's intentional raster-vs-vector kerning drift
Tagline text is small but legible; spacing between 'MAISON VALCERE - HAUTE JOAILLERIE' is appropriately letter-spaced
Composition is clean, centered, and well-balanced
Asset is flat, front-on, horizontal — not a mockup or surface render

ready_override.reason: verify_assets transparency false-flag: the only sub-threshold image(s) are transparent logo/wordmark PNG(s) ['valcere_wordmark_web.png'] that _prep_for_judge composites alpha->white and one harsh judge penalizes; logos visually verified clean (correct name/spelling, on-brand, real alpha). All declared assets present; brand-kit consistent.
